SEVERAL HOMES RECEIVED MODERATE TO SUBSTANTIAL DAMAGE. ONE OUT BUILDING WITH NO FOUNDATION SUPPORT COMPLETELY DESTROYED. SEVERAL TREES SNAPPED IN HALF. DEBRIS LOFTED AND REPORTEDLY CARRIED AS FAR AS 1 TO 2 MILES DOWNWIND. DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH HAVING 70 TO 90 MPH WIND GUSTS.
